{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113445682F1DFB5E36B87FC9CEE"}"},"total":3024},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7294485580837258023","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"全文结构紧凑，内容充实；行文逻辑缜密，伏笔都有很好体现。夏长明和苏月璃两位男女主刻画的生动传神，其中女主对于男主的情感变化十分自然，两人的感情也在矛盾与冲突中逐渐升华，这是此文的一大亮点。除此之外，文中人人都有鲜明的性格特征，他们都有各自的理想抱负。他们不是文中主角的陪衬，而是自己生活的主角，为自身他人的幸福理想而奔波，这是众生之相。总体来说，本文实乃神作，五分实至名归。期待作者更多精彩作品，我们有缘再见[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1698381151,"group_id":"7190901444831087649","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3SOXLvR/M2DDiLp1h6UAzMzCoj9Bup9REMqWuLD9jwa","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/94a5edbdddd9406b95a5daa813a59c23~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615556&x-signature=TAcgurOGOW1Zg3sW3eMbODuG8HQ%3D","user_id":"3452903219273406","user_name":"坡地可爱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3452903219273406","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7190901444831087649","book_info":{"abstract":"本书又名《我家娘子总想谋害我》、《闭关十年，出山即无敌》
【人妖+单女主+宠妻+无敌】
人妖两族自古世仇，千百年间纷争不断。
夏长明，意外穿越而来，身怀仙姿玉骨，偶得剑仙传承，闭关十年便屹立于世间之巅！
出山时恰逢妖族大举进犯天周王朝国境，一日攻破边境关隘，人族存亡危矣！
为了人妖两族长久和平，世间再无战火纷争，夏长明仅凭一人一剑，只身执剑杀入妖族帝宫，将长剑架在妖族女帝脖颈。
“我给你两个选择。”
“要么你嫁给我，要么我娶你。”
妖族女帝苏月璃：“…”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2cb3c9ef2ccf0f6377f27ae632e9e4b4","author":"屋上懒猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7190901444831087649","book_name":"我，剑尊，逼婚妖族女帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7190984944250782265","read_count":"32431","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1002513"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"469","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,穿越,女帝,无敌,单女主,架空,开局,东方玄幻,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/28ab7fcb09b7a714d842d8d7d124880d~tplv-noo 【人妖+单女主+宠妻+无敌】
人妖两族自古世仇，千百年间纷争不断。
夏长明，意外穿越而来，身怀仙姿玉骨，偶得剑仙传承，闭关十年便屹立于世间之巅！
出山时恰逢妖族大举进犯天周王朝国境，一日攻破边境关隘，人族存亡危矣！
为了人妖两族长久和平，世间再无战火纷争，夏长明仅凭一人一剑，只身执剑杀入妖族帝宫，将长剑架在妖族女帝脖颈。
“我给你两个选择。”

妖族女帝苏月璃：“…”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2cb3c9ef2ccf0f6377f27ae632e9e4b4","author":"屋上懒猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7190901444831087649","book_name":"我，剑尊，逼婚妖族女帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7190984944250782265","read_count":"32431","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1002513"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"469","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,穿越,女帝,无敌,单女主,架空,开局,东方玄幻,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/28ab7fcb09b7a714d842d8d7d124880d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255896&x-signature=4mutoOcAIWaiApbDhJkMczo1%2FWU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3966636738492973","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.640377e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113445682F1DFB5E36B87FC9CEE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读44分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":37,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2640,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":91995},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1680803585,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7293931531998462730","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作为1个礼拜就追完整本的读者，我也来发表一下看法吧~
先来说说本书的优点，首先就是情节的部分，节奏不紧不慢，给人一种很舒适、自然的感觉，那些强行水字数拖剧情又或者是2,3篇带过重要节点的情况基本没有出现。再就是人物的描写了，只能说作者的文笔真的很不错，无论是战斗的场景又或者是角色的样貌都描述的很具体，亲热发糖的剧情基本也不怎么避讳，给人一种自己也在亲热环境下的感觉🙈而且人物的个性也塑造的十分鲜明，从最初对夏长明怀恨、而后将爱意藏于心底从而展现出傲娇一面、到后来正视自己后的主动（勉强算吧，毕竟药是他下的[捂脸]），苏月璃的心境变化描写的十分具体，而且转变的原因也十分合理，夏长明那始终悠闲、自信的性格也很令人印象深刻。而且在主线发糖的剧情以外，也添加了许多角色的感情线，每个都很甜也都很有独特的发展情况（这里就不一一细说了）
至于比较令我看不大懂的，就是在「穿越」这个部分的铺陈，一开始毫无预兆，直到慢慢看到后面才发现「这...怎么突然扯到蓝星了」？当下实属有点懵，而这个疑惑到了近乎结局的部分才有所解答，可是解答的又似乎没那么准确，那个穿越究竟是如何发生的？为什么魔神之心可以让他再次梦回那个原本的世界？等等比较细微的小问题在我的脑子里频繁的出现。
不过，总体而言，这本书无论是剧情的想象又或者是笔力的展现都很不错，上述的问题可能单纯是因为我想太多了吧[捂脸]很推荐大家可以看看，比那些后宫文、系统文好看很多！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1698251923,"group_id":"7190901444831087649","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz3g1lSF5QM8Cf/abwdMHbjQUw1JRShk0ZQPyiv9CFR2","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1522150928551357","user_name":"喜欢铁沙铃的米楠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1522150928551357","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7190901444831087649","book_info":{"abstract":"本书又名《我家娘子总想谋害我》、《闭关十年，出山即无敌》

夏长明，意外穿越而来，身怀仙姿玉骨，偶得剑仙传承，闭关十年便屹立于世间之巅！
出山时恰逢妖族大举进犯天周王朝国境，一日攻破边境关隘，人族存亡危矣！
为了人妖两族长久和平，世间再无战火纷争，夏长明仅凭一人一剑，只身执剑杀入妖族帝宫，将长剑架在妖族女帝脖颈。
